title: Freight rail usage and performance: October to December 2025
text:
Official statistics are produced impartially and free from political influence.

Freight rail usage and performance: October to December 2025

https://dataportal.orr.gov.uk/statistics/usage/freight-rail-usage-and-performance/
description: Quarterly and periodic (4-weekly) statistics on the volume of freight transported by rail and the punctuality of those services.
